# gigahost_server_reverse (Resource)

Manages reverse DNS (PTR) for a Gigahost server address.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "gigahost_server_reverse" "example" {
  srv_id     = gigahost_server.example.srv_id
  ip_id      = 2002
  ip_v4v6    = "ipv4"
  ip_reverse = "server.example.com"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `ip_id` (Number) IP address id.
- `ip_reverse` (String) Reverse DNS (PTR) for the address. Use an empty string to clear it.
- `ip_v4v6` (String) IP version for the address. Valid values are `ipv4` and `ipv6`.
- `srv_id` (String) Server id that holds the IP address.

### Read-Only

- `ip_address` (String) The IP address.
- `ip_type` (String) IP address type, for example `primary` or `extra`.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
# Server reverse DNS resources can be imported by server id, IP version, and IP id.
terraform import gigahost_server_reverse.example 1001/ipv4/2002
```
